title: Viewing updates/files on the archive tab
excerpt: Is there a way to view the files/updates that are in a specific item from the archives tab without having to restore the item and then able to see the files? I think this would be very helpful without having to restore t…

posts.author: Nathan32 (Nathan Spoo)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to view the files/updates that are in a specific item from the archives tab without having to restore the item and then able to see the files? I think this would be very helpful without having to restore the item and then go back and look at the updates/files.
